findings.where: Definition 2.3 body; post-definition explanatory paragraph; Remark 2.5
findings.issue: Several non-seed additions lack an immediately preceding expansion comment.
findings.evidence: The informal tangent-direction sentence, the paragraph listing failure modes after Definition 2.3, and the Leibniz-notation Remark 2.5 add material beyond the seed but are not preceded by `<!-- expansion:... -->` comments.
findings.suggestion: Add expansion comments before those added blocks, unless the linter accepts a broader grouping comment.

findings.where: Definition 2.3 informal paragraph and following paragraph
findings.issue: The draft briefly gestures beyond the brief's intended `|x|` corner discussion of non-differentiability.
findings.evidence: It says differentiability means “no vertical spike” and says the quotient may fail because it “blows up.” The brief’s do-not-write list discourages extra non-differentiability examples such as vertical-tangent/cusp material, though the draft does not develop a separate example.
findings.suggestion: If enforcing the brief strictly, trim the vertical/blow-up aside and keep the failure-mode discussion centered on the `|x|` left/right limit mismatch.

findings.issue: The theorem is given a descriptive name although the brief inventories the manuscript theorem as unnamed.
findings.evidence: Brief: `Theorem（無命名）`; draft: env-name `Differentiable implies continuous`.
findings.suggestion: Remove the env-name if exact manuscript-style theorem labeling is desired.

summary: No blocking findings. The draft is mathematically correct, faithful to the seed’s backbone, and covers the brief-mandated definition, `|x|` example, Figure 2.3 content, Theorem 2.1 proof, one-way caution, higher-derivative notation, and Example 2.12.
